name: 2d-metaverse
//: Minimal root convenience scripts only (issue #25: one lint command per package + one root convenience). Deliberately no dependencies/workspaces — PRD 8 grows this into the npm-workspaces root.

scripts.lint: npm --prefix frontend run lint && npm --prefix backend run lint
scripts.typecheck: npm --prefix frontend run typecheck && npm --prefix backend run typecheck
scripts.test: npm --prefix frontend test && npm --prefix backend test
